tasks.title: Clarify prompt guidance for next task ID command
evidence: User request: "Update prompts to clarify which command to use when trying to fetch the next-id for task IDs. See this agent output from a recent run ''ralph queue next' returns existing IDs, I'll run 'ralph queue next-id' to get new IDs and note this deviation in the summary to maintain accuracy while respecting instructions.'"
plan: Locate the prompt text that instructs agents on fetching task IDs
Update wording to distinguish between `ralph queue next` (next task) and `ralph queue next-id` (new ID)
Add or adjust examples to reflect the correct command usage
Validate prompt changes by inspecting the updated prompt text in the relevant source
tasks.request: Update prompts to clarify which command to use when trying to fetch the next-id for task IDs. See this agent output from a recent run ''ralph queue next' returns existing IDs, I'll run 'ralph queue next-id' to get new IDs and note this deviation in the summary to maintain accuracy while respecting instructions.'

tasks.title: Capture tool/command calls in codex JSON stream
evidence: User request: 'Create a task to enhance the codex runner JSON streaming output to capture tool and command calls in addition to messages.'
User provided codex exec JSON output for review in /tmp/codex-exec.json
plan: Locate codex JSON streaming output handling in the runner execution path
Extend JSON event parsing to capture tool and command call payloads alongside messages
Add/extend tests that assert tool and command calls are emitted in the JSON stream
Validate against the captured /tmp/codex-exec.json fixture or a minimal repro
tasks.request: Create a task to enhance the codex runner JSON streaming output to capture tool and command calls in addition to messages. The user has captured the outputs of 'codex exec --json "Say hello. Then connect to repo prompt and get the file tree. Then run a bash command to list files in this repo. then send 'I'm done now' and exit" 2>&1 | tee /tmp/codex-exec.log' in the /tmp/codex-exec.json file for review

tasks.title: Support 'draft' task status
